sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-01-31 08:44
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 1:02:15
- Elapsed time: 1:02:28
- Elevation gain: 20.4 m
- Average heart rate: 148 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 141.6 W
- Average speed: 6.8 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `146.6 bpm`, ranging from `86.0` to `173.7 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `140.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `153.5 bpm` (+12.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `158.0 spm`, with a working range of `105.7` to `172.0 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `156.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `157.5 spm` (+1.5 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `8:53 /km` across `7.002 km` in `1:02:15` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `9:14 /km` and second-half pace was `8:33 /km` (-40 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `148.0 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `141.7 bpm` in the first half and `154.2 bpm` in the second (+12.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:02:15` out of `1:02:28` elapsed (99.7%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `69` stop segments and `10.0%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `38.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.4 m` and `13.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `22.4 m` in the first half and `16.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
